title: Notice of garret street road closure to bay view
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Garret Street will be...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Garret Street will be temporarily closed to Bay View Traffic between 25 September and 13 December 2024 to allow reconstruction and widening of the road.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Garret Street will be temporarily closed to Bay View Traffic between 25 September and 13 December 2024 to allow reconstruction and widening of the road."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Only road users to Local Businesses in Garret Street will be allowed access while the road is under half-width construction.","html":"Only road users to Local Businesses in Garret Street will be allowed access while the road is under half-width construction."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Western Cape Government is working hard to maintain our roads. Please drive carefully during this period of construction. Let us work together to ensure that our roads are safe, for you!","html":"The Western Cape Government is working hard to maintain our roads. Please drive carefully during this period of construction. Let us work together to ensure that our roads are safe, for you!"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
